A

ActiveOrdersController - Class in com.app.cashier
Controller for the active orders view.
ActiveOrdersController() - Constructor for class com.app.cashier.ActiveOrdersController
 
addToCart() - Method in class com.app.cashier.CustomizationController
Collects selected customizations and adds the item to the cart.

C

cancel() - Method in class com.app.cashier.CustomizationController
Cancels customization and closes the panel without adding to cart.
cart_items - Static variable in class com.app.cashier.CartController
List of cart item strings in the format "itemName::customization1|customization2".
CartController - Class in com.app.cashier
Controller for the shopping cart view.
CartController() - Constructor for class com.app.cashier.CartController
 
checkout() - Method in class com.app.cashier.CartController
Handles checkout by transferring all cart items to active orders and navigating to the active orders view.
com.app.cashier - package com.app.cashier
 
CustomizationController - Class in com.app.cashier
Controller for the item customization panel.
CustomizationController() - Constructor for class com.app.cashier.CustomizationController
 

D

DatabaseManager - Class in com.app.cashier
Manages the PostgreSQL database connection for the cashier application.
DatabaseManager() - Constructor for class com.app.cashier.DatabaseManager
 

G

getConnection() - Static method in class com.app.cashier.DatabaseManager
Creates and returns a new connection to the PostgreSQL database using the credentials provided at startup.

I

id - Variable in class com.app.cashier.MenuItem
The unique identifier for this menu item.
ingredients - Variable in class com.app.cashier.MenuItem
Comma-separated list of ingredients for this menu item.
initialize() - Method in class com.app.cashier.ActiveOrdersController
Initializes the controller by refreshing the displayed orders.
initialize() - Method in class com.app.cashier.CartController
Initializes the controller by refreshing the cart display.
initialize() - Method in class com.app.cashier.MainController
Initializes the controller, stores the singleton instance, and loads the menu as the default view.
initialize() - Method in class com.app.cashier.MenuController
Initializes the controller by loading items from the database and populating the menu grid with cards.
instance - Static variable in class com.app.cashier.MainController
Singleton instance used by other controllers to trigger navigation.

L

loadPage(String) - Method in class com.app.cashier.MainController
Loads an FXML page into the content area, replacing the current view.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class com.app.cashier.Main
Main method that launches the JavaFX application.
Main - Class in com.app.cashier
Entry point for the Cashier JavaFX application.
Main() - Constructor for class com.app.cashier.Main
 
MainController - Class in com.app.cashier
Main navigation controller for the cashier application.
MainController() - Constructor for class com.app.cashier.MainController
 
MenuController - Class in com.app.cashier
Controller for the menu view.
MenuController() - Constructor for class com.app.cashier.MenuController
 
MenuItem - Class in com.app.cashier
Represents a menu item from the database.
MenuItem(int, String, double, String) - Constructor for class com.app.cashier.MenuItem
Constructs a new MenuItem with the specified attributes.

N

name - Variable in class com.app.cashier.MenuItem
The display name of this menu item.

O

orders - Static variable in class com.app.cashier.ActiveOrdersController
List of active orders, where each order is a list of item strings.

P

price - Variable in class com.app.cashier.MenuItem
The price of this menu item.

S

setItem(String, String, StackPane) - Method in class com.app.cashier.CustomizationController
Configures the customization panel for a specific menu item.
showActiveOrders() - Method in class com.app.cashier.MainController
Navigates to the active orders view.
showCart() - Method in class com.app.cashier.MainController
Navigates to the cart view.
showMenu() - Method in class com.app.cashier.MainController
Navigates to the menu view.
start(Stage) - Method in class com.app.cashier.Main
Starts the JavaFX application by loading the main FXML view and displaying it in a new stage.
